topics.title: C++ Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)
subtopics: Constructor Types: Default, Parameterized, Copy, Move
Rule of 3 / Rule of 5 / Rule of 0
topics.description: Comprehensive coverage of OOP principles in C++, including class design, inheritance hierarchies, polymorphism through virtual functions, and the vtable mechanism.

topics.title: C++ Memory Management
topics.description: Manual memory management in C++, understanding stack vs heap, proper use of new/delete, and common memory-related bugs.

topics.title: Smart Pointers (C++11)
topics.description: Modern C++11 smart pointers for automatic memory management and RAII patterns.

topics.title: References, Copying, and Moving
topics.description: Value categories, move semantics, perfect forwarding, and compiler optimizations for efficient object handling.

topics.title: Operator Overloading
topics.description: How to overload operators in C++ to create intuitive interfaces for custom types.

topics.title: Type System and Casting
topics.description: C++ casting operators, when to use each type, and type safety implications.

topics.title: Templates and Generics
topics.description: Generic programming using templates, specialization, and compile-time programming techniques.

topics.title: STL Containers and Algorithms
topics.description: Standard Template Library containers, performance characteristics, and commonly used algorithms.

topics.title: C++11 Features (Most Interview Relevant)
topics.description: Most interview-relevant features introduced in C++11, focusing on modern C++ idioms.

topics.title: RAII and Resource Management
topics.description: Resource management through RAII idiom and exception safety levels.

topics.title: Multithreading (C++11 Intro)
topics.description: Introduction to multithreading in C++11, synchronization primitives, and thread-safe programming.

topics.title: Design Patterns in C++
topics.description: Classic design patterns adapted for C++ and SOLID principles for good object-oriented design.

topics.title: Compile-Time Magic (Intro Only)
topics.description: Introduction to compile-time programming using constexpr, type traits, and template metaprogramming.

topics.title: Low-Level & Tricky Topics
topics.description: Low-level C++ topics including memory layout, bit-level operations, and system-level programming.

topics.title: C++14 Feature Deep Dive
topics.description: Features introduced in C++14, focusing on improvements to lambdas, templates, and constexpr.

topics.title: C++17 Features Overview
topics.description: Overview of C++17 features including structured bindings, compile-time conditionals, and new vocabulary types.
